cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: The first time you run it, you'll see the EULA on your headset but then it will all just go black. After killing it and reloading it all worked fine. It is slow to load though with no loading screen on the HMD so be patient.
title: The Gallery - Episode 2: Heart of the Emberstone

notes: Valve Index, 100%-ed the game without problem. The game is very performance demanding however and on low settings I never reached more than a mildly acceptable framerate.
title: The Gallery - Episode 2: Heart of the Emberstone
